mapper.select: SELECT s.id, s.student_id studentId, s.course_id courseId, s.teacher_id teacherId, s.score, s.create_time createTime, u.username studentName, c.course_name courseName FROM score s LEFT JOIN `user` u ON s.student_id = u.id LEFT JOIN course c ON s.course_id = c.id WHERE s.teacher_id = #{teacherId}

SELECT s.id, s.student_id studentId, s.course_id courseId, s.teacher_id teacherId, s.score, s.create_time createTime, u.username studentName, t.username teacherName, c.course_name courseName FROM score s LEFT JOIN `user` u ON s.student_id = u.id LEFT JOIN `user` t ON s.teacher_id = t.id LEFT JOIN course c ON s.course_id = c.id WHERE s.student_id = #{studentId}

SELECT DISTINCT u.id studentId, u.username studentName, c.id courseId, c.course_name courseName FROM score s LEFT JOIN `user` u ON s.student_id = u.id LEFT JOIN course c ON s.course_id = c.id WHERE s.teacher_id = #{teacherId}
select * from score where student_id = #{studentId} and course_id = #{courseId}
